setup_task.sh seed script, checking expiry dates against Jan 1, 2025

privileged_info_summary: The target repository is 'Chemical Storage', which is synthetically seeded with 5 items via setup_task.sh. The items 'Acetonitrile' (2022-05-20), 'Methanol' (2023-11-10), and 'Chloroform' (2021-08-30) have expiration dates before the January 1, 2025 threshold and must be archived. The items 'Ethanol 96%' (2027-01-15) and 'Isopropanol' (2026-05-05) expire after the threshold and must be kept.
